title: C.Weapons
description: Adds content to the game related to the creation of weapons and new ingots.
body:
C.Weapons is a mod for new weapons and other content related to the adventure and exploration of the world of Minecraft!

****What does this mod add?****

20+ swords with unique attack mehanics

Various tools

More new recources

5 ores

WAY more endgame weapons!

Leash craft (yes this is very important...).

And other content...

VERY many achievements


![Wind blade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3553f761285694c7d077c9dde31751688aa811ce.png)
![New ingots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/81991720843a4d33fbbcc196fa7bdeb3d73123e4.png)![Ores](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be027d7e1ce1d83c3a23f55bbf7cd0e237eb0787.png)![end library](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/263a4aed6037cf1560b6fbd81073018f59aaba5f_0.webp)



![Perfect void book](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/615dc47f2831d7476a91b4284d56034ef492322b_0.webp)
